leadText: Defeatist (Japanese: よわき Timid) is an Ability introduced in Generation V. It is the signature Ability of Archen and Archeops.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] Defeatist halves the user's Attack and Special Attack stats when their HP is equal to or less than half of its maximum. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Defeatist has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] Defeatist halves the user's Attack and Special Attack stats when their HP is equal to or less than half of its maximum.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD GtI When its HP is half or lower, the Pokémon does less damage. * When the Pokémon's HP is down to half or lower, its moves do less damage! * S MD When the Pokémon's HP is down to half or lower, the Pokémon's moves do less damage!
